```{r}
        "Detections classification",
        "Detections regression",
        "CO2 emissions regression"
      )
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x = importance,
    y = tidytext::reorder_within(model_feature_long, importance, model)
  )) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(
    x = "Feature importance score (Gini impurtity corrected)",
    y = "",
  ) +
  theme_plot() +
  tidytext::scale_y_reordered() +
  facet_wrap(model ~ ., ncol = 1, scales = "free")
```

## Figure 17

```{r}
#| label: fig-spatial-coverage-footprint
#| fig-cap: Spatial coverage of the non-broadcasting emissions model. Areas are categorized according to whether they fall inside or outside the S1 footprint and whether they have been imaged by S1 at any point in time. A given pixel may be imaged in some months but not in others. Pixels outside the footprint have never been imaged. The percentage of total CO$_{2}$ emissions from non-broadcasting vessels attributed to each category is shown.
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 7

total_spatial_co2_emissions_dark_by_footprint |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    dark_emissions_by_area |>
      dplyr::select(inside_footprint, s1_imaged, percent_total),
    by = c("inside_footprint", "s1_imaged")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    footprint = dplyr::case_when(
      inside_footprint == FALSE ~ "Outside S1 footprint",
      inside_footprint == TRUE &
        s1_imaged == TRUE ~ "Inside S1 footprint imaged",
      inside_footprint == TRUE &
        s1_imaged == FALSE ~ "Inside S1 footprint not imaged",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(footprint) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    facet_label = glue::glue(
      "{footprint} ({percent_total} of non-broadcasting emissions)"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world_bbox_sf,
    fill = map_background_color,
    color = NA
  ) +
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_tile(
    aes(
      x = lon_bin + 0.5,
      y = lat_bin + 0.5,
      fill = footprint
    ),
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_sf(data = land, color = "#374a6d", fill = "#374a6d") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c(
      "Outside S1 footprint" = "#d90101ff",
      "Inside S1 footprint imaged" = "#d90101ff",
      "Inside S1 footprint not imaged" = "#d90101ff"
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~facet_label, ncol = 1) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# Supplementary materials: Supplementary figures

## Figure S1

```{r}
#| label: fig-pollutant-maps-qlog10
#| fig-cap: Spatial maps 2024 emissions for each GHG and pollutant, aggregated across AIS-broadcasting vessels and non-broadcasting vessels, and shown at a 1x1 degree spatial resolution. Emissions are area-normalized for each pixel (metric tonnes per square kilometer), and shown using a log-10 scale.
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8

pollutant_map_data_all <- total_spatial_emissions_by_pollutant_formatted |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = dplyr::case_when(
      pollutant == "CO2" ~ "CO[2]",
      pollutant == "N2O" ~ "N[2]*O",
      pollutant == "CH4" ~ "CH[4]",
      pollutant == "PM2.5" ~ "PM[2.5]",
      pollutant == "PM10" ~ "PM[10]",
      pollutant == "SOX" ~ "SO[X]",
      pollutant == "NOX" ~ "NO[X]",
      TRUE ~ pollutant
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = forcats::fct_relevel(pollutant, pollutant_factor_levels)
  )

pollutant_map_list <- purrr::map(
  unique(pollutant_map_data_all$pollutant),
  function(pollutant_tmp) {
    pollutant_tmp <- as.character(pollutant_tmp)

    pollutant_map_data <- pollutant_map_data_all |>
      dplyr::filter(pollutant == pollutant_tmp)

    scale_limits <- pollutant_map_data |>
      dplyr::summarize(
        min = quantile(emissions_mt_per_km2_2024, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE),
        max = max(emissions_mt_per_km2_2024, na.rm = TRUE)
      ) |>
      as.numeric()

    pollutant_map_data |>
      ggplot() +
      geom_sf(
        data = world_bbox_sf,
        fill = map_background_color
      ) +
      ggspatial::geom_spatial_tile(
        aes(
          x = lon_bin + 0.5,
          y = lat_bin + 0.5,
          color = emissions_mt_per_km2_2024,
          fill = emissions_mt_per_km2_2024
        )
      ) +
      geom_sf(data = land, color = "#374a6d", fill = "#374a6d") +
      scico::scale_fill_scico(
        name = expression(Emissions ~ (MT / km^2)),
        palette = "vik",
        begin = 0.5,
        end = 1,
        limits = scale_limits,
        trans = "log10",
        na.value = map_background_color,
        labels = scales::scientific
      ) +
      scico::scale_color_scico(
        name = expression(Emissions ~ (MT / km^2)),
        palette = "vik",
        begin = 0.5,
        end = 1,
        limits = scale_limits,
        trans = "log10",
        na.value = map_background_color,
        labels = scales::scientific
      ) +
      labs(x = "", y = "") +
      theme_void() +
      guides(
        fill = guide_colorbar(
          title.position = "top",
          title.hjust = 0.5,
          frame.colour = "white",
          ticks.colour = "white"
        )
      ) +
      scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 1)) +
      scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 1)) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm")
      ) +
      facet_wrap(pollutant ~ ., labeller = label_parsed)
  }
)

cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = pollutant_map_list, ncol = 3)
```

## Figure S2

```{r}
#| label: fig-pollutant-time-series
#| fig-cap: Time series of monthly global emissions for each GHG and pollutant, aggregated across AIS-broadcasting vessels and non-broadcasting vessels for which we only have Sentinel-1 data.
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8

pollutant_time_series_data_all <- total_monthly_emissions_by_pollutant |>
  dplyr::mutate(month = lubridate::ymd(month)) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    -month,
    names_to = "pollutant",
    values_to = "emissions_mt"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = stringr::str_remove_all(pollutant, "emissions_") |>
      stringr::str_remove_all("_total_mt") |>
      stringr::str_to_upper() |>
      stringr::str_replace_all("_", "."),
    pollutant = ifelse(pollutant == "VOCS", "VOCs", pollutant)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    lubridate::year(month) <= analysis_end_year,
    lubridate::year(month) >= analysis_start_year
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = dplyr::case_when(
      pollutant == "CO2" ~ "CO[2]",
      pollutant == "N2O" ~ "N[2]*O",
      pollutant == "CH4" ~ "CH[4]",
      pollutant == "PM2.5" ~ "PM[2.5]",
      pollutant == "PM10" ~ "PM[10]",
      pollutant == "SOX" ~ "SO[X]",
      pollutant == "NOX" ~ "NO[X]",
      TRUE ~ pollutant
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = forcats::fct_relevel(pollutant, pollutant_factor_levels)
  )

make_pollutant_time_series_figure <- function(
  pollutant_time_series_data,
  y_axis_label
) {
  {
    ggplot(
      data = pollutant_time_series_data,
      aes(x = month, y = emissions_mt)
    ) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
      theme_plot() +
      labs(x = "", y = y_axis_label) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0)
      ) +
      scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = seq(
          lubridate::ymd(glue::glue("{analysis_start_year}-01-01")),
          lubridate::ymd(glue::glue("{analysis_end_year+1}-01-01")),
          by = "1 year"
        ),
        labels = seq(analysis_start_year, analysis_end_year + 1)
      ) +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), labels = scales::comma)
  }
}

make_pollutant_time_series_figure(
  pollutant_time_series_data_all,
  y_axis_label = "Monthly emissions (MT)"
) +
  facet_wrap(
    pollutant ~ .,
    ncol = 3,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = label_parsed
  )
```

## Figure S3

```{r}
#| label: fig-annual-emissions-by-ocean-and-data-source
#| fig-cap: Annual total CO2 emissions by ocean, disaggregated by data source (AIS-broadcasting vessels, and non-broadcasting vessels detected by S1).
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 7.5
ocean_time_series_fig_data <- total_spatial_co2_emissions_by_ocean |>
  dplyr::select(ocean, year, emissions_co2_mt, emissions_co2_dark_mt) |>
  dplyr::rename(AIS = emissions_co2_mt, S1 = emissions_co2_dark_mt) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    -c(ocean, year),
    values_to = "emissions_mt",
    names_to = "fleet"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(ocean = stringr::str_to_title(ocean))

ggplot(
  ocean_time_series_fig_data,
  aes(x = year, y = emissions_mt, fill = fleet)
) +
  geom_area(position = 'stack', alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(
    data = subset(ocean_time_series_fig_data, fleet == "S1"),
    aes(x = year, y = emissions_mt),
    color = "white"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6),
    limits = c(0, NA)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = all_data_source_color_palette,
    breaks = c("AIS", "S1")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(
      analysis_start_year,
      analysis_end_year
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ocean, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_plot() +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = expression(Annual ~ CO[2] ~ emissions ~ (MT)),
    fill = "Data source"
  )
```

# Supplementary materials: Supplementary tables

## Table S1

```{r}
#| results = 'asis'
total_percent_change_by_fleet_tbl <- total_percent_change_by_fleet |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    fleet = dplyr::case_when(
      fleet == "AIS (broadcasting)" ~ "AIS",
      fleet == "S1 (non-broadcasting)" ~ "S1",
      TRUE ~ "AIS + S1"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(across(
    c(`2017`, `2024`),
    ~ signif(., 3) |>
      prettyNum(big.mark = ",")
  )) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = stringr::str_to_upper(pollutant) |>
      stringr::str_replace_all("_", "."),
    pollutant = ifelse(pollutant == "VOCS", "VOCs", pollutant)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = forcats::fct_relevel(pollutant, pollutant_factor_levels_tables)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      c(percent_total_2024, percent_change),
      ~ scales::percent(., accuracy = 1)
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(pollutant) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    `Source` = fleet,
    Pollutant = pollutant,
    `2017 emissions, MT` = `2017`,
    `2024 emissions, MT` = `2024`,
    `Percent 2024 total` = percent_total_2024,
    `2017 to 2024 change` = percent_change
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(
    format = "latex",
    label = "total_percent_change_by_fleet",
    caption = "Summary of 2017 and 2024 emissions, data source and pollutant."
  ) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 6, latex_options = "hold_position")

total_percent_change_by_fleet_tbl

writeLines(
  total_percent_change_by_fleet_tbl,
  here::here("tables/total_percent_change_by_fleet.tex")
)
```

## Table S2

```{r}
#| results = 'asis'
pollutant_ais_underestimation_overestimation_summary_tbl <- pollutant_ais_underestimation_overestimation_summary |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = stringr::str_to_upper(pollutant) |>
      stringr::str_replace_all("_", "."),
    pollutant = ifelse(pollutant == "VOCS", "VOCs", pollutant)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pollutant = forcats::fct_relevel(pollutant, pollutant_factor_levels_tables)
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(pollutant) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    Pollutant = pollutant,
    "Underestimation of 2024 emissions" = ais_underestimation_2024,
    "Overestimation of 2017-2024 emissions trend" = trend_overestimation_2017_2024
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(
    format = "latex",
    label = "pollutant_ais_underestimation_overestimation_summary",
    caption = "Underestimation of 2024 emissions using only AIS data, and overestimation of 2017 to 2024 emissions trend using only AIS data, by pollutant."
  ) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 8, latex_options = "hold_position")

pollutant_ais_underestimation_overestimation_summary_tbl

writeLines(
  pollutant_ais_underestimation_overestimation_summary_tbl,
  here::here(
    "tables/pollutant_ais_underestimation_overestimation_summary.tex"
  )
)
```

## Table S3

```{r}
#| results = 'asis'

# Make and output a table summarizing 2024 CO2 emissions by ocean, and change in emissions from 2017 to 2024 by ocean
# Figure out for each ocean the fraction of observations that were imaged by s1
percent_pixels_imaged_ocean_all_time <- annual_emissions_by_ocean_normalized |>
  dplyr::group_by(ocean) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    fraction_n_imaged = (sum(number_observations_imaged) /
      sum(number_observations)) |>
      scales::percent(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
emissions_by_ocean_summary_tbl <- annual_emissions_by_ocean_normalized |>
  dplyr::filter(year == 2024) |>
  dplyr::group_by(year) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    percent_annual_total = (emissions_co2_mt_total /
      sum(emissions_co2_mt_total)) |>
      scales::percent(accuracy = 0.01),
    percent_emissions_co2_mt_normalized = emissions_co2_mt_normalized |>
      scales::percent(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(percent_pixels_imaged_ocean_all_time, by = "ocean") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    `Percent of total CO2 emissions by non-broadcasting` = (emissions_co2_dark_mt /
      emissions_co2_mt_total) |>
      scales::percent(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    ocean = stringr::str_to_sentence(ocean) |>
      stringr::str_remove_all(" ocean")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    emissions_co2_mmt = prettyNum(
      signif(emissions_co2_mt / 1e6, 3),
      big.mark = ","
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    Ocean = ocean,
    `2024 total CO2 emissions (million MT)` = emissions_co2_mmt,
    `Percent of total CO2 2024 emissions` = percent_annual_total,
    `Percent of total CO2 emissions by non-broadcasting`,
    `Percent change in total CO2 emissions (2017 to 2024)` = percent_emissions_co2_mt_normalized,
    `Percent observations imaged by S1 (across 2017-2024)` = fraction_n_imaged,
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = -Ocean) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Ocean, values_from = value) |>
  dplyr::rename(`Summary statistic` = name) |>
  knitr::kable(
    format = "latex",
    label = "emissions_by_ocean_summary_tbl",
    caption = "For each ocean, summary of: 2024 total (AIS+S1) CO$_2$ emissions (metric tonnes); percentage of global total (AIS+S1) 2024 CO$_2$ emissions from across all oceans; percent of 2024 total (AIS+S1) CO$_2$ emissions by non-broadcasting vessels; percent change in total (AIS+S1) CO$_2$ emissions from 2017 to 2024; and the percentage of all observations in the dataset (pixel-months) from 2017-2024 that were imaged by S1.",
    digits = 3
  ) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = "hold_position")

emissions_by_ocean_summary_tbl

writeLines(
  emissions_by_ocean_summary_tbl,
  here::here("tables/emissions_by_ocean_summary_tbl.tex")
)
```

## Table S4

```{r}
#| results = 'asis'

# Make and output a table summarizing 2024 CO2 emissions by data source, and change in emissions from 2017 to 2024 by data source
emissions_by_data_source_summary_tbl <- all_edgar_gfw_data_normalized |>
  dplyr::filter(
    data_source %in%
      c(
        "Other transportation sectors (EDGAR)",
        "Marine vessels (AIS + S1)",
        "All sectors (EDGAR)"
      )
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(year == 2024) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    emissions_co2_bmt = prettyNum(
      signif(emissions_co2_mt / 1e9, 3),
      big.mark = ","
    ),
    percent_emissions_co2_mt_normalized = emissions_co2_mt_normalized |>
      scales::percent(accuracy = 0.01),
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(
    `Data source` = data_source,
    `2024 emissions, billion MT` = emissions_co2_bmt,
    `Change in emissions, 2017 to 2024` = percent_emissions_co2_mt_normalized
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(
    format = "latex",
    label = "emissions_by_data_source_summary_tbl",
    caption = "For each data source, summary of: total 2024 CO$_2$ emissions (metric tonnes); and percent change in CO$_2$ emissions from 2017 to 2024.",
    digits = 3
  ) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 8, latex_options = "hold_position")

emissions_by_data_source_summary_tbl

writeLines(
  emissions_by_data_source_summary_tbl,
  here::here("tables/emissions_by_data_source_summary_tbl.tex")
)
```

## Table S5

```{r}
#| results: 'asis'

annual_sc_fishing_non_fishing_tbl <- annual_sc_fishing_non_fishing |>
  dplyr::select(
    Year = year,
    `Vessel type` = fishing,
    GHG = pollutant,
    `Emissions (MT)` = emissions_mt,
    `SC (USD/MT)` = sc_usd_per_mt,
    `SC (billion USD)` = sc_billion_usd
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(
    format = "latex",
    label = "social_cost_summary_tbl",
    caption = "For both non-fishing vessels and fishing vessels, we summarize: the total emissions (metric tonnes) of each GHG gas; the social cost associated with each GHG (USD/metric tonne); the social cost of each (USD); the total social cost summed across all three gasses (USD). We use 2021 for non-fishing vessels since it is the year for which we have the total value of all traded goods at sea. We use 2022 for fishing vessels since it is the year for which we have the total value of wild capture fisheries.",
    digits = 3
  ) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 8, latex_options = "hold_position")

annual_sc_fishing_non_fishing_tbl

writeLines(
  annual_sc_fishing_non_fishing_tbl,
  here::here("tables/annual_sc_fishing_non_fishing_tbl.tex")
)
```

# Supplementary materials: Supplementary figures: Comparing our emission estimates to other inventories

## Figure S4

```{r}
#| label: fig-inventory-comparison
#| fig-cap: Comparison of annual marine vessel CO$_{2}$ emissions inventory estimates.
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 6

all_inventory_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = emissions_co2_mt, color = data_source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "B", scale = 1e-9),
    limits = c(0, 1.5e9),
    breaks = seq(0, 1.5e9, 0.25e9)
  ) +
  theme_plot() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(annual_emissions$year),
    limits = c(analysis_start_year, analysis_end_year)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = expression(Annual ~ CO[2] ~ emissions ~ (MT))
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Emissions inventory",
    values = all_data_source_color_palette,
    breaks = c("GFW (AIS + S1)", "IMO", "GFW (AIS)", "OECD", "EDGAR")
  )
```

## Table S6
```{r}
#| results: 'asis'
all_inventory_data_kable <- all_inventory_data |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    emissions_co2_mt = as.character(signif(emissions_co2_mt, 3) / 1e9)
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = "data_source",
    values_from = "emissions_co2_mt"
  ) |>
  dplyr::rename(Year = year) |>
  dplyr::relocate(Year, `GFW (AIS + S1)`, `GFW (AIS)`) |>
  dplyr::mutate(across(everything(), ~ tidyr::replace_na(., "-"))) |>
  knitr::kable(
    format = "latex",
    label = "inventory_comparison",
    caption = "Comparison of annual marine vessel CO$_{2}$ emissions inventory estimates (billions of metric tonnes)."
  ) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 8, latex_options = "hold_position")

all_inventory_data_kable

all_inventory_data_kable |>
  writeLines(
    here::here("tables/inventory_comparison.tex")
  )
```

## Figure S5

```{r}
#| label: fig-annual-emissions-by-ais-receiver-type
#| fig-cap: Annual total CO$_{2}$ emissions (metric tonnes) by AIS-broadcasting vessels, AIS pings (i.e., individual vessel timestamped location messages), and number of unique AIS-broadcasting vessels. Trends are disaggregated by AIS receiver type (satellite, terrestrial, and dynamic), and also shown as a total aggregated across receiver types. A dashed vertical line is shown for 2022, the first year in which dynamic AIS was widely adopted.
# | #| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 7
annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type <- annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type |>
  # Don't include unknown receiver type
  dplyr::filter(receiver_type != "unknown") |>
  # Fill in missing values with 0s
  tidyr::complete(
    receiver_type,
    tidyr::nesting(year),
    fill = list(emissions_co2_mt = 0, n_distinct_ssvid = 0, number_pings = 0)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(receiver_type = stringr::str_to_sentence(receiver_type)) |>
  # Don't use 2025 data, since the year is incomplete
  dplyr::filter(year < 2025)

annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type |>
  dplyr::rename(
    `CO[2]~emissions~(MT)` = emissions_co2_mt,
    `Number~unique~vessels` = n_distinct_ssvid,
    `Number~AIS~messages` = number_pings,
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = -c(year, receiver_type)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = value, color = receiver_type)) +
  facet_wrap(name ~ ., scales = "free_y", ncol = 1, labeller = label_parsed) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6),
    limits = c(0, NA)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type$year)
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(
    type = "qual",
    palette = "Set2",
    guide = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)
  ) +
  theme_plot() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", color = "AIS receiver type") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2022, linetype = 2)
```

## Figure S6

```{r}
#| label: fig-annual-emissions-by-ais-receiver-type-top-flags
#| fig-cap: Annual total CO$_{2}$ emissions (metric tonnes) by AIS-broadcasting vessels, disaggregated by AIS receiver type (satellite, terrestrial, and dynamic) and total aggregated across receiver types, for the top 10 flags with the most emissions in 2024. A dashed vertical line is shown for 2022, the first year in which dynamic AIS was widely adopted.
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 6
annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type_and_flag <- annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type_and_flag |>
  # Add column name for country name based on flag

  dplyr::mutate(
    flag = countrycode::countrycode(
      flag,
      origin = "iso3c",
      destination = "country.name"
    )
  ) |>
  # Don't include unknown receiver type
  dplyr::filter(receiver_type != "unknown") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    receiver_type = stringr::str_to_sentence(receiver_type) |>
      forcats::fct_relevel("Satellite", "Terrestrial", "Dynamic")
  ) |>
  # Fill in missing values with 0s
  tidyr::complete(
    receiver_type,
    tidyr::nesting(year, flag),
    fill = list(emissions_co2_mt = 0, n_distinct_ssvid = 0)
  ) |>
  # Don't use 2025 data, since the year is incomplete
  dplyr::filter(year < 2025)

top_n_flags_2024 <- annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type_and_flag |>
  dplyr::filter(year == 2024, receiver_type == "Total") |>
  dplyr::slice_max(n = 10, order_by = emissions_co2_mt) |>
  dplyr::select(flag)

annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type_and_flag |>
  dplyr::inner_join(top_n_flags_2024, by = "flag") |>
  dplyr::mutate(flag = forcats::fct_relevel(flag, top_n_flags_2024$flag)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = emissions_co2_mt, color = flag)) +
  facet_grid(receiver_type ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type_and_flag$year)
  ) +
  theme_plot() +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(CO[2] ~ emissions ~ (MT)), color = "Flag") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2022, linetype = 2) +
  paletteer::scale_color_paletteer_d(palette = "rcartocolor::Safe")

```

## Figure S7

```{r}
#| label: fig-co2-emissions-change-map-by-receiver-type
#| fig-cap: Spatial change in CO$_{2}$ emissions by AIS-broadcasting vessels between 2017 and 2024 (metric tonnes) by receiver type (satellite, terrestrial, and dynamic) and total across receiver types, at a 1x1 degree spatial resolution; emissions are area-normalized for each pixel (metric tonnes per square kilometer, shown on a pseudolog-10 scale).
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 8
# Annual spatial CO2 emissions vt receiver type  (satellite; dynamic; or terrestrial)
annual_spatial_emissions_by_receiver_type <- annual_spatial_emissions_by_receiver_type |>
  # Don't include unknown receiver type
  dplyr::filter(receiver_type != "unknown") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    receiver_type = stringr::str_to_sentence(receiver_type) |>
      forcats::fct_relevel("Satellite", "Terrestrial", "Dynamic")
  ) |>
  # Don't use 2025 data, since the year is incomplete
  dplyr::filter(year < 2025) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    emissions_mt_per_km2 = emissions_co2_mt /
      lat_to_area(lat_bin, pixel_size_analysis)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-emissions_co2_mt)

annual_spatial_emissions_by_receiver_type |>
  dplyr::filter(year %in% c(analysis_start_year, analysis_end_year)) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = emissions_mt_per_km2) |>
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(`2017`, `2024`), ~ tidyr::replace_na(., 0))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(emissions_mt_per_km2 = `2024` - `2017`) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world_bbox_sf,
    fill = map_background_color
  ) +
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_tile(aes(
    x = lon_bin + 0.5,
    y = lat_bin + 0.5,
    fill = emissions_mt_per_km2,
    color = emissions_mt_per_km2
  )) +
  geom_sf(data = land, color = "#374a6d", fill = "#374a6d") +
  facet_wrap(receiver_type ~ ., ncol = 1) +
  scico::scale_fill_scico(
    expression(atop(
      Change ~ of ~ CO[2] ~ emissions,
      from ~ 2017 ~ to ~ 2024 ~ (MT / km^2)
    )),
    palette = "vik",
    midpoint = 0,
    trans = ggallin::pseudolog10_trans,
    na.value = map_background_color,
    breaks = c(-1e3, -1e2, -1e1, 0, 1e1, 1e2, 1e3),
    labels = scales::comma
  ) +
  scico::scale_color_scico(
    expression(atop(
      Change ~ of ~ CO[2] ~ emissions,
      from ~ 2017 ~ to ~ 2024 ~ (MT / km^2)
    )),
    palette = "vik",
    midpoint = 0,
    trans = ggallin::pseudolog10_trans,
    na.value = map_background_color,
    breaks = c(-1e3, -1e2, -1e1, 0, 1e1, 1e2, 1e3),
    labels = scales::comma
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.direction = "vertical") +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust = 0.5,
      frame.colour = "black",
      ticks.colour = "black",
      barwidth = unit(1, "cm"),
      barheight = unit(5, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 1)) +
  coord_sf(crs = map_projection)
```
